component.name: M3ULoaderTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "loadM3U" end sub
sub loadM3U() url = m.top.url
http = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") http.setUrl(url) http.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.initClientCertificates() http.setConnectionTimeout(30)
response = http.getToString() m.top.content = response end sub
